_comment: Migration: Sword Intent Storm Circuit. 3 waypoints, 3 follower types, 1 emergent markets. Per migration directive: migration is a major simulation system. The world breathes because markets appear seasonally along routes. Prime Directive: route exists objectively; player enters a world already moving.
name: Sword Intent Storm Circuit
description: The seasonal circuit of sword-intent storms between sword peaks, drawing sword cultivators.

follower_chain.note: Sword cultivators follow for intent cultivation.

simulation_notes.world_breathes: Markets appear and disappear seasonally; the world changes whether or not the player acts.
simulation_notes.follower_dynamics: Each follower type arrives with a delay proportional to distance_li; predators arrive after prey, scavengers after predators, bandits after cultivators, merchants after stability.
